active-agents-kpi.description: Count of agents active in the window, with a vs-previous-period delta. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(start, end)` (positional Dates) → `{ items }`. Module returns `[{ value, previous }]`: value = count over the dashboard window; previous = count over the equal-length prior window via `priorWindow(start, end)` from @/lib/time (works for any time range, not a fixed 30/60-day offset). The card renders the delta badge automatically from `previous`. For a plain KPI with no badge, return `[{ value }]` (omit previous).

defaults.title: Active Agents
defaults.description: Agents with at least one run

agent-consumption.description: Agents ranked by units consumed. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(startTime, endTime, { orderBy: { column: AgentListSortColumn.QuantityAGU, desc: true } })` → `{ items }`. Import AgentListSortColumn from the same subpath.

agent-health.description: Agents ranked by health score (worst first). SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getAll(startTime, endTime, { orderBy: { column: AgentListSortColumn.HealthScore, desc: false } })` → `{ items }`. healthScore is 0–100.

defaults.title: Agent Health
defaults.description: Agents ranked by health score — lowest first

agent-error-timeline.description: Agent error counts over time (total across agents). SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getErrorsTimeline(startTime, endTime, { limit })` (positional Dates) → BARE array `[{ name (agent), value (count), date }]`. Module aggregates per date — sum `value` grouped by `date` → `[{ date, value }]`. Import from @uipath/uipath-typescript/agents.

agent-latency-timeline.description: Agent latency percentiles over time. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getLatencyTimeline(startTime, endTime)` (positional Dates) → BARE array `[{ name ('P50'|'P95'), value (ms), date }]`. Module pivots long→wide per date — `[{ date, P50, P95 }]`. xKey: date; series plots P50/P95.

agent-consumption-timeline.description: AGU consumption over time. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getConsumptionTimeline(startTime, endTime)` (positional Dates) → BARE array `[{ timeSlice, aguConsumption }]` (native chart shape — return as-is).

agent-errors.description: Agent error classes ranked by occurrence. SDK: `new Agents(sdk as never).getErrors(startTime, endTime, { orderBy: { column: AgentErrorSortColumn.ExecutionCount, desc: true } })` → `{ items: AgentError[] }`. Import AgentErrorSortColumn from the same subpath. Rows on `.items`.

trace-error-timeline.description: Trace-level error counts over time (grouped by error name; module sums per date for a total trend). SDK: `new AgentTraces(sdk as never).getErrorsTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` (options object) → BARE array `[{ name (error name), value, date }]`. Subpath: @uipath/uipath-typescript/traces.

trace-latency-timeline.description: Trace-level latency over time (decimal SECONDS). SDK: `new AgentTraces(sdk as never).getLatencyTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` → BARE array `[{ name (series), value (seconds), date }]`. The `name` values are not fixed percentiles — module averages `value` per `date` across series → `[{ date, value }]`. To plot distinct series, inspect the live `name` values and switch to multi-line-chart with those exact keys. Subpath: @uipath/uipath-typescript/traces.

agent-unit-consumption.description: Per-agent AGU/PLTU unit totals (trace-level). SDK: `new AgentTraces(sdk as never).getUnitConsumption({ startTime, endTime })` → BARE array `[{ agentId, folderKey, agentVersion, agentUnitsConsumed, platformUnitsConsumed }]`. Subpath: @uipath/uipath-typescript/traces.

agent-memory-timeline.description: Agent memory entries over time. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` (options object — Dates INSIDE it) → BARE array `[{ timeSlice, totalCount, inMemoryCount, ... }]`. Subpath: @uipath/uipath-typescript/agent-memory.

memory-calls-trend.description: Agent memory access volume over time. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getCallsTimeline({ startTime, endTime })` → BARE array `[{ timeSlice, memoryCallsCount }]`.

top-memory-spaces.description: Top memory spaces by entry count. SDK: `new AgentMemory(sdk as never).getTopSpaces({ startTime, endTime, limit: 10 })` → BARE ranked array `[{ memorySpaceName, memoryCount, ... }]`.

defaults.title: Top Memory Spaces
defaults.description: Memory spaces ranked by entry count

policy-denials.description: Governance denials. SDK: `new Governance(sdk as never).getPolicyTraces(startTime, { evaluationResult: [PolicyEvaluationResult.Deny, PolicyEvaluationResult.SimulatedDeny] })` (startTime positional Date, REQUIRED) → `{ items }`. Needs elevated/org-admin access — surface a 403 as a permissions message.

governance-verdicts.description: Allow/Deny/NoOp enforcement breakdown. SDK: `new Governance(sdk as never).getOperationSummary(startTime)` → SINGLE object `{ totalEvaluations, allowedCount, deniedCount, noOpCount }`. fnBody must transform to rows: `return [{ name: 'Allowed', value: s.allowedCount }, { name: 'Denied', value: s.deniedCount }, { name: 'Simulated', value: s.noOpCount }]`.

job-failures.description: Faulted jobs filtered with Jobs.getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted'" }) → { items: [{processName, state, createdTime}] }. template: data-table

defaults.title: Faulted Jobs
defaults.description: Jobs currently in a faulted state

job-completion-trend.description: Successful jobs with Jobs.getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Successful'" }) → { items: [{processName, state, endTime}] }. template: data-table

case-sla-status.description: Case-instance SLA status breakdown. SDK: page `new CaseInstances(sdk as never).getSlaSummary({ pageSize: 200, cursor })` via fetchAll → rows on `.items`, each `{ slaStatus, ... }`. Module groups by `String(slaStatus)` ('On Track'|'At Risk'|'Overdue'|'Completed'|'Unknown') → `[{ name, value }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read PIMS (SLA needs PIMS). 403 ⇒ permissions message.

case-sla-breaches.description: Case instances at SLA risk. SDK: fetchAll over `new CaseInstances(sdk as never).getSlaSummary({ pageSize: 200, cursor })` (rows on `.items`), filter `String(slaStatus) === 'At Risk' || === 'Overdue'`. Each row: `{ name, externalId, slaStatus, slaDueTime, instanceStatus, processKey }`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read PIMS.

defaults.title: Cases at SLA Risk
defaults.description: Case instances at risk or overdue on SLA

case-stage-sla.description: Stage-level SLA per case instance. SDK: `new CaseInstances(sdk as never).getStagesSlaSummary()` → BARE `[{ caseInstanceId, stages: [{ name, slaStatus, slaDueTime, latestStatus }] }]`. Module flattens: `data.flatMap(d => d.stages.map(s => ({ caseInstanceId: d.caseInstanceId, stage: s.name, slaStatus: s.slaStatus, slaDueTime: s.slaDueTime, latestStatus: s.latestStatus })))`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read PIMS.

top-maestro-processes-by-runs.description: Top Maestro processes by run count (≤5). SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getTopRunCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` (positional Dates) → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, runCount, name }]` (return as-is). Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Busiest Processes
defaults.description: Maestro processes ranked by run count

top-maestro-processes-by-faults.description: Top Maestro processes by faulted count (≤10). SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getTopFaultedCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, faultedCount, name }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

top-maestro-processes-by-duration.description: Top Maestro processes by total execution duration (≤5). SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getTopExecutionDuration(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, duration, name }]` (`duration` ms). Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Slowest Processes
defaults.description: Maestro processes ranked by total duration

maestro-process-status-timeline.description: Maestro process instance status over time. SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getInstanceStatusTimeline(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ startTime, status, count }]` (`status` Completed/Faulted/Cancelled). Module pivots per `startTime`, seeding all 3 series to 0 → `[{ date, Completed, Faulted, Cancelled }]`. xKey: date. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

top-failing-process-elements.description: Top failing BPMN elements across Maestro processes (≤10). SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getTopElementFailedCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ elementName, elementType, processKey, failedCount }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

top-cases-by-runs.description: Top case processes by run count (≤5). SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getTopRunCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` (positional Dates) → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, runCount, name }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Busiest Cases
defaults.description: Case processes ranked by run count

top-cases-by-faults.description: Top case processes by faulted count (≤10). SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getTopFaultedCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, faultedCount, name }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

top-cases-by-duration.description: Top case processes by total duration (≤5). SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getTopExecutionDuration(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ packageId, processKey, duration, name }]` (`duration` ms). Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Slowest Cases
defaults.description: Case processes ranked by total duration

case-status-timeline.description: Case instance status over time. SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getInstanceStatusTimeline(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ startTime, status, count }]` (Completed/Faulted/Cancelled). Module pivots per `startTime`, seeding all 3 series to 0 → `[{ date, Completed, Faulted, Cancelled }]`. xKey: date. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

top-failing-case-elements.description: Top failing BPMN elements across case processes (≤10). SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getTopElementFailedCount(THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW)` → BARE `[{ elementName, elementType, processKey, failedCount }]`. Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/cases. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Top Failing Case Elements
defaults.description: Case BPMN elements ranked by failures

agent-governance-violations.description: GATED — runtime compliance / standards / rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim). NOT for generic governance/policy/denials — those are the Insights-API metrics `policy-denials` / `governance-verdicts`. See sdk/governance-traces.md. Total runtime rule violations across the top 10 most-recently-active agents (bounded by-agent scan). Module: scanViolations(sdk) (governance-traces.md) → `[{ value: violations.length }]`. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

violations-by-standard.description: GATED — runtime/standard/pack/ISO intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Runtime rule violations grouped by standard/pack. Module: `return countBy(await scanViolations(sdk), v => v.standard)` → `[{ name, value }]`. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

violations-by-rule.description: GATED — runtime/rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Rules ranked by how often they fired at runtime. Module: group scanViolations(sdk) by ruleName → `[{ name (ruleName), value (count), standard }]` (or countBy(violations, v => v.ruleName)). Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

violations-by-hook.description: GATED — runtime/rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Runtime rule violations grouped by lifecycle hook (BEFORE_AGENT/BEFORE_MODEL/AFTER_MODEL/AFTER_AGENT). Module: `return countBy(await scanViolations(sdk), v => v.hook)`. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

agents-by-violations.description: GATED — runtime/standard/rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Agents ranked by runtime rule-violation count. Module: `return countBy(await scanViolations(sdk), v => v.agentName)`. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

recent-violations.description: GATED — runtime/standard/rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Recent runtime rule violations (one row per fired rule). Module: `return await scanViolations(sdk)` → GovernanceViolation rows. rowLink to the per-agent report. Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Recent Governance Violations
defaults.description: Rules fired across recent agent runs

agent-compliance-report.description: GATED — runtime compliance / standards / rule-violation intent ONLY (trace-derived; interim; NOT generic governance — see `policy-denials`/`governance-verdicts`). See sdk/governance-traces.md. Agents list (Agents.getAll → .items); rowLink to a per-agent report whose fetchDetailByKey(sdk, agentName) shows that agent's latest run's rule list (PASS/MATCHED) grouped by hook. Export BOTH fetchData (agents) + fetchDetailByKey (see governance-traces.md). Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read OR.Jobs.Read. rowLink → a per-agent RICH detail view (donut by hook + ranked rules + full table) via `detailView` + a named-source `fetchDetailByKey`.

defaults.title: Agent Compliance
defaults.description: Click an agent for its latest-run governance report

jobs-duration-threshold.description: Jobs running longer than threshold minutes. SDK: `new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Running'" })` then filter by computed duration `(endTime-startTime)/60000 > threshold`

jobs-by-state.description: Jobs filtered by execution state. SDK: `new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "State eq '${params.value}'" })` → `{ items: [{processName, state, createdTime}] }`

tasks-by-status.description: Action Center tasks filtered by status. SDK: `new Tasks(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "Status eq '${params.value}'" })` → `{ items: [{title, status, priority, createdTime}] }`

defaults.title: Tasks by Status
defaults.description: Action Center tasks filtered by status

cases-running-above.description: Maestro cases where runningCount > threshold. SDK: `new Cases(sdk as never).getAll()` then filter `runningCount > threshold`. Scope: PIMS (Cases.getAll).

defaults.title: High-Volume Cases
defaults.description: Processes with running case count above threshold

element-latency-stats.description: Per-BPMN-element execution + duration percentiles for one process/case. SDK: `new MaestroProcesses(sdk as never).getElementStats('<processKey>', '<packageId>', THIRTY_DAYS_AGO, NOW, '<version>')` → BARE `[{ elementId, successCount, failCount, terminatedCount, pausedCount, inProgressCount, minDurationMs, maxDurationMs, avgDurationMs, p50DurationMs, p95DurationMs, p99DurationMs }]`. Identifiers baked in from params at authoring time. For case management use `new Cases(...)` (same signature). Subpath @uipath/uipath-typescript/maestro-processes (or /cases). Scope: Insights Insights.RealTimeData OR.Folders.Read.

defaults.title: Element Latency
defaults.columns: [{key:"elementId",label:"Element"},{key:"successCount",label:"OK",align:"right" as const},{key:"failCount",label:"Fail",align:"right" as const},{key:"avgDurationMs",label:"Avg ms",align:"right" as const},{key:"p95DurationMs",label:"P95 ms",align:"right" as const}]

hardRefuse.pattern: invocation volume|invocations over time|invocation count|calls per agent
hardRefuse.reason: SDK 1.4.1 has no agent invocation-count timeline. (It does have an AGU consumption timeline and an error timeline — those are separate metrics.)
hardRefuse.alternative: agent-consumption-timeline (T1 — AGU over time), agent-error-timeline (T1), or T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "ProcessType eq 'Agent'" }) bucketed by date for a run-volume trend.

hardRefuse.reason: The platform tracks AGU/PLTU units, not currency.
Per-agent CPU/RAM is not exposed by any API. (Note: 'Agent Memory' is the memory-entries feature, not RAM.)
hardRefuse.alternative: agent-health (T1) for health scores; agent-memory-timeline (T1) if they meant the Agent Memory feature.

hardRefuse.reason: Job records carry no end-user identity.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3-SDK: new Jobs(sdk as never).getAll({ filter: "ProcessName eq 'x'" }) grouped by processName. For governance events, policy-denials (T1) includes actorIdentityId.

hardRefuse.reason: Dashboards are scoped to one tenant — except governance traces, which support fullOrganization: true (requires org admin).
hardRefuse.alternative: Multi-widget single-tenant view; or T3 Governance.getPolicyTraces(start, { fullOrganization: true }) for org-wide governance data.

hardRefuse.reason: No endpoint returns raw RPA-job stack traces / exception text. (Aggregated error CLASSES are available: Agents.getErrors → {type, description, count} (agent-errors T1); Maestro process errors via ProcessIncidents.getAll → {errorMessage, count}.)
hardRefuse.alternative: agent-errors (T1) for agent error classes; T3 ProcessIncidents.getAll for Maestro process error messages; or faulted-jobs data-table (errorCode/jobError per row) for RPA.

hardRefuse.reason: QueueGetResponse has no failure-count field (id, name, maxNumberOfRetries, … only) — see sdk/orchestrator.md.
hardRefuse.alternative: T3 via Jobs SDK: getAll({ filter: "State eq 'Faulted'" }) grouped by processName for the most-failing processes.
